objective: Add bounded default-off Sixel DCS and iTerm OSC 1337 inline PNG adapters over the Phase 13 image model.

baseline.note: Use dedicated clean slice worktrees; do not touch the dirty primary fix/windows-version-resource-from-tag worktree.

in_scope: low-half Kitty and high-half internal ID namespaces
selected bounded Sixel DCS and streaming iTerm OSC framing
pure bounded adapters and shared decode scheduler
strict v2 independent default-off restart configuration
transactional any-protocol model and GL cache activation
security, fuzz, performance and manual qualification
excluded: file, path, URL, download, temp or shared-memory transport
default-on activation or stable support claims
invariants: core.Cell stays text-only and exactly 32 bytes
owner-thread parser, core and mux publication
detached snapshots contain no pixels, stores or GL handles
all image protocols disabled creates no image infrastructure or idle cadence
